research_strategy_overview.approach: Systematic constraint-driven filtering combined with methodological feasibility analysis.
research_strategy_overview.primary_goal: Select a CORE A* (2009–2012) paper focused on ARIMA or classical time-series modeling that is reproducible within 24 hours under CPU-only constraints.
selection_dimensions: Alignment with ARIMA or classical time-series modeling
Uniqueness relative to class submission sheet

llm_tools_used.usage_role: Constraint verification, structured reasoning, and feasibility evaluation

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Careful parsing of exam PDF requirements.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt_summary: Understand venue restrictions, algorithm categories (ARIMA/SVM/GMM), and compute limits.
full_llm_interaction_log.independent_verification: Manually re-read the PDF to confirm the 2009–2012 year constraint and CORE A* requirement.
full_llm_interaction_log.outcome: Created a written checklist used to validate each candidate paper.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt_summary: Cross-verify candidate papers against uploaded class response CSV.
full_llm_interaction_log.independent_verification: Manually scanned author names and titles in the CSV to confirm no duplication.
full_llm_interaction_log.outcome: Confirmed selected paper was not already claimed.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Identify ARIMA-based papers in eligible venues.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt_summary: Find a free CORE A* paper (2009–2012) using ARIMA or classical time-series modeling.
Evaluate whether the selected paper is suitable for replication within one day.
full_llm_interaction_log.independent_verification: Read abstract and methodology section to confirm ARIMA-based modeling structure.
full_llm_interaction_log.outcome: Classified complexity as moderate but implementable using statsmodels.

full_llm_interaction_log.independent_verification: Confirmed ARIMA implementation available in standard Python libraries.
Reviewed experimental section to confirm reproducibility clarity.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt_summary: Generate final formatted details for exam submission.
full_llm_interaction_log.independent_verification: Cross-checked title, authors, venue, and year via ACM Digital Library.

final_selected_paper.title: Discovery of Significant Emerging Trends
final_selected_paper.venue: ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD)
selection_justification: Methodological contribution centered on statistical time-series modeling.
Unique relative to class submission sheet.

student_reflection.key_learning: Constraint-driven filtering and early feasibility estimation significantly reduce replication risk under strict time limitations.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file represents a complete and honest record of my LLM-assisted research process. All eligibility checks, methodological evaluations, and final decisions were independently verified through manual inspection of official sources.
